stemHtml: A general aviation aircraft is on fire. The pilot declares a MAYDAY and sees a runway in front, ATC informs the pilot that the runway is closed for administrative reasons. According to the Standardised European Rules of the Air (SERA), the pilot:

options.a: Must choose to land on the most suitable surface but avoid the closed runway.
options.b: Can still decide to land on the closed runway for safety reasons.
options.c: CANNOT land on a closed runway under any circumstances.
options.d: Must divert to an airport that is open to public air traffic.
